Mixed martial arts events
2020 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki
Information
First dateJuly 11, 2020
Last dateDecember 19, 2020
Events
Total events6

Chronology
2019 in KSW 2020 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2021 in KSW

The year 2020 was the 17th year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. 2020 will begin with KSW 53.[1]

Background

[edit]

Martin Lewandowski announced that KSW has plans for European expansion and will intend to do a new series of smaller events in 2020. KSW has plans for a reality TV show.[2][3]

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW 53: Reborn July 11, 2020 Undisclosed Studio Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW 54: Gamrot vs. Ziółkowski August 29, 2020 Global EXPO Warsaw, Poland
3 KSW 55: Askham vs. Khalidov 2 October 10, 2020 Wytwórnia Club Łódź, Poland
4 Genesis: Różalski vs. Barnett October 23, 2020 Wytwórnia Club Łódź, Poland
5 KSW 56: Materla vs. Soldić[4][5][6][7] November 14, 2020 Wytwórnia Club Łódź, Poland
6 KSW 57: De Fries vs. Kita December 19, 2020 Wytwórnia Club Łódź, Poland

Only One

[edit]

The series was officially announced by KSW and POLSAT TV at a press conference on December 7, 2019. The trainers for the series, which will feature 10 welterweight fighters, will be Marcin Wrzosek and Łukasz Zaborowski. The 10 fighters will be competing for a contract with KSW. The weekly series will culminate in a live finale on POLSAT TV. It debuted on POLSAT TV on March 6, 2020.

  • Paweł Kiełek
  • Piotr Walawski
  • Mariusz Radziszewski

  • Bartłomiej Gładkowicz

2Adrian Bartosiński was injured and couldn't participate in the final, and was subsequently replaced by Marcin Krakowiak.

KSW 53: Reborn

[edit]
KSW 53: Reborn
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJuly 11, 2020
VenueUndisclosed Studio
City Warsaw, Poland

'KSW 53: Reborn' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on July 11, 2020 in Warsaw, Poland.[1]

The event was initially planned to be held on March 21, 2020 at the Atlas Arena in Łódź, Poland.[8] However, the event was cancelled on March 11, 2020, due to the COVID-19 pandemic.[9]

Background

[edit]

Norman Parke missed weight ahead of his trilogy bout with Mateusz Gamrot for the undisputed KSW Lightweight Title. Both parties have agreed to complete their trilogy, however, the bout was a five-round catchweight non-title bout.

Roman Szymański was scheduled to face Mateusz Legierski, but Legierski was forced off the card on June 25 with an injury. Filip Pejić served as Legierski's replacement, taking the short notice fight against Szymański.

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Roman Szymański vs. Filip Pejić
  • Knockout of the Night: Michał Pietrzak
  • Knockout of the Night: Sebastian Przybysz

Results

[edit]
KSW 53
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Catchweight 71.8 kg Mateusz Gamrot def. Norman Parke TKO (Doctor Stoppage) 3 3:02
Lightweight 70 kg Borys Mańkowski def. Marcin Wrzosek Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Middleweight 84 kg Tomasz Drwal def. Łukasz Bieńkowski TKO (Punches) 2 2:34
Welterweight 77 kg Andrzej Grzebyk def. Tomasz Jakubiec TKO (Punches) 2 0:15
Lightweight 70 kg Roman Szymański def. Filip Pejić TKO (Punches) 3 4:37
Lightweight 70 kg Artur Sowiński def. Gracjan Szadziński TKO (Punches) 1 2:04
Catchweight 80 kg Michał Pietrzak def. Kamil Szymuszowski KO (Punches) 1 0:56
Bantamweight 61 kg Sebastian Przybysz def. Jakub Wikłacz TKO (Punches to the Body) 3 1:18

KSW 54: Gamrot vs. Ziółkowski

[edit]
KSW 54: Gamrot vs. Ziółkowski
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateAugust 29, 2020
VenueGlobal EXPO
City Warsaw, Poland

'KSW 54: Gamrot vs. Ziółkowski' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on August 29, 2020 in Warsaw, Poland.

Background

[edit]

Shamil Musaev was scheduled to challenge Mateusz Gamrot in the KSW 54 main event, but Musaev has to withdraw from the bout due to a knee injury sustained in training. Marian Ziółkowski was pulled from a planned bout with Maciej Kazieczko and faced Gamrot for the KSW Lightweight Championship in the KSW 54 main event. Kazieczko instead faced Karlo Caput who stepped in on short notice for this encounter.

Łukasz Rajewski missed weight by two pounds ahead of his scheduled lightweight bout with Bartłomiej Kopera. Both parties have agreed to compete a catchweight bout, Rajewski has been fined 30 percent of his purse.

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Łukasz Rajewski vs. Bartłomiej Kopera
  • Knockout of the Night: Michał Kita
  • Performance of the Night: Sebastian Rajewski

Results

[edit]
KSW 54
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight 70 kg Mateusz Gamrot (c) def. Marian Ziółkowski Decision (Unanimous) 5 5:00 For the KSW Lightweight Championship
Heavyweight 120 kg Izu Ugonoh def. Quentin Domingos TKO (Leg Injury) 1 2:22
Heavyweight 120 kg Michał Kita def. Michał Andryszak KO (Punch) 1 2:59
Lightweight 70 kg Maciej Kazieczko def. Karlo Caput TKO (Punches) 3 4:29
Bantamweight 61 kg Paweł Polityło def. Bogdan Barbu Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Lightweight 70 kg Łukasz Rajewski def. Bartłomiej Kopera Decision (Split) 3 5:00
Welterweight 77 kg Kacper Koziorzębski def. Adam Niedźwiedź TKO (Leg Injury) 2 2:27
Lightweight 70 kg Sebastian Rajewski def. Armen Stepanyan Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00

KSW 55: Askham vs. Khalidov 2

[edit]
KSW 55: Askham vs. Khalidov 2
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateOctober 10, 2020
VenueWytwórnia Club
City Łódź, Poland

'KSW 55: Askham vs. Khalidov 2' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on October 10, 2020 at the Wytwórnia Club in Łódź, Poland.

Background

[edit]

A KSW Middleweight Championship rematch between current champion Scott Askham and former champion Mamed Khalidov served as the event's headliner.[10][11] The pairing met previously at KSW 52: Race on December 7, 2019 in a catchweight non-title bout, Askham had dominated Khalidov during three round to capture the unanimous decision win.[12]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Michał Materla vs. Aleksandar Ilić
  • Knockout of the Night: Mamed Khalidov
  • Submission of the Night: Damian Stasiak

Results

[edit]
KSW 55
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Mamed Khalidov def. Scott Askham (c) KO (Head Kick) 1 0:32 For the KSW Middleweight Championship
Middleweight 84 kg Michał Materla def. Aleksandar Ilić TKO (Elbows) 2 1:32
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Damian Janikowski def. Andreas Gustafsson Decision (Split) 3 5:00
Welterweight 77 kg Tomasz Romanowski def. Ion Surdu[13] Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight 61 kg Damian Stasiak def. Patryk Surdyn Submission (Arm-Triangle Choke) 2 4:17
Catchweight 95 kg Przemysław Mysiala def. Stipe Bekavac TKO (Punches) 2 4:06
Welterweight 77 kg Krystian Kaszubowski def. Jakub Kamieniarz Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
W.Strawweight 52 kg Karolina Wójcik def. Sylwia Juśkiewicz Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00

Genesis: Różalski vs. Barnett

[edit]
Genesis: Różalski vs. Barnett
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateOctober 23, 2020
City Poland

'Genesis: Różalski vs. Barnett' was a bare-knuckle fighting event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on October 23, 2020.

Background

[edit]

KSW has launched a new bare knuckle fighting event serie called Genesis.[14]

Former UFC heavyweight Josh Barnett returned to the ring when he took on the former KSW heavyweight champion Marcin Rozalski in a bare-knuckle boxing match in the first main event under the Genesis banner.[15][16]

Results

[edit]
Genesis
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight 120 kg Josh Barnett def. Marcin Różalski TKO (Doctor Stoppage) 2 3:00
Catchweight 65 kg Michał Królik def. Bartosz Batra Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 80 kg Vaso Bakocević def. Dariusz Rutkiewicz TKO (Punches) 2 0:57
Catchweight 73 kg Gracjan Szadziński def. Jan Siroky KO (Punch to the body) 2 1:52
W.Featherweight 57 kg Aleksandra Rola def. Monika Porażyńska Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Heavyweight 120 kg Rafał Kijańczuk def. Marcin Wasilewski Decision (Split) 3 3:00
Catchweight 72 kg Damian Szmigielski def. Denis Makowski Decision (Split) 3 3:00

KSW 56: Materla vs. Soldić

[edit]
KSW 56: Materla vs. Soldić
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateNovember 14, 2020
VenueWytwórnia Club
City Łódź, Poland

KSW 56: Materla vs. Soldić was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on November 14, 2020 at the Wytwórnia Club in Łódź, Poland.

Background

[edit]

In the event headliner, the reigning KSW welterweight champion Roberto Soldić moved up to 185 pounds to challenge the former KSW middleweight champion Michał Materla.[17]

The co-main event of the evening featured a title bout between the reigning KSW light heavyweight champion Tomasz Narkun and the undefeated Croatian Ivan Erslan.[18][19]

Sebastian Rajewski was scheduled to face Michał Sobiech, but Sobiech was forced off the card on November 4 due to a hand injury. Filip Pejić served as Sobiech replacement, takes short notice fight against Rajewski.[20]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Daniel Torres vs. Max Coga
  • Knockout of the Night: Filip Pejić
  • Submission of the Night: Robert Ruchała

Results

[edit]
KSW 56
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Roberto Soldić def. Michał Materla TKO (Punches) 1 4:40
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Tomasz Narkun (c) def. Ivan Erslan Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 2 0:51 For the KSW Light Heavyweight Championship
W.Flyweight 57 kg Justyna Haba def. Karolina Owczarz Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Welterweight 77 kg Marius Zaromskis def. Andrzej Grzebyk TKO (Leg Injury) 1 4:58
Catchweight 73 kg Mateusz Legierski def. Francisco Barrio Decision (Majority) 3 5:00
Catchweight 68 kg Filip Pejić def. Sebastian Rajewski KO (Punches) 1 0:09
Featherweight 66 kg Daniel Torres def. Max Coga Decision (Split) 3 5:00
Featherweight 66 kg Robert Ruchała def. Michał Domin Submission (Armbar) 1 4:59

KSW 57: De Fries vs. Kita

[edit]
KSW 57: De Fries vs. Kita
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateDecember 19, 2020
VenueWytwórnia Club
City Łódź, Poland

'KSW 57: De Fries vs. Kita' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on December 19, 2020 at the Wytwórnia Club in Łódź, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The event featured three title fights.[21] In the headliner, Phil De Fries has put his KSW heavyweight crown on the line against Michał Kita.[22] Marian Ziółkowski and Roman Szymański has battled for the vacant KSW lightweight belt[23] and KSW bantamweight champion, Antun Račić, has met Bruno dos Santos in the first defense of his KSW bantamweight title.[24][25]

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:[26]

  • Fight of the Night: Marcin Krakowiak vs. Kacper Koziorzębski
  • Knockout of the Night: Marian Ziółkowski
  • Submission of the Night: Abusupiyan Magomedov

Results

[edit]
KSW 57
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight 120 kg Phil De Fries (c) def. Michał Kita TKO (Punches) 2 0:59 For the KSW Heavyweight Championship
Lightweight 70 kg Marian Ziółkowski def. Roman Szymański KO (Kick to the Body) 4 4:00 For the Vacant KSW Lightweight Championship
Lightweight 70 kg Borys Mańkowski def. Artur Sowiński Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight 61 kg Antun Račić (c) def. Bruno dos Santos Decision (Unanimous) 5 5:00 For the KSW Bantamweight Championship
Middleweight 84 kg Abusupiyan Magomedov def. Cezary Kęsik Submission (Guillotine Choke) 2 1:52
Middleweight 84 kg Patrik Kincl def. Tomasz Drwal KO (Punch) 1 4:22
Catchweight 80 kg Marcin Krakowiak def. Kacper Koziorzębski Submission (Guillotine Choke) 3 4:06
Welterweight 77 kg Christian Eckerlin def. Albert Odzimkowski Decision (Split) 3 5:00
